error.message: Subquery returned more than 1 value. This is not permitted when the subquery follows =, !=, <, <= , >, >= or when the subquery is used as an expression. Cannot insert the value NULL into column 'partnerTypeTouchpointQuestionnaire', table 'hs3MVCMTQa2.dbo.autoMailMessage'; column does not allow nulls. UPDATE fails. The statement has been terminated.
error.detail: System.Data.EntityCommandExecutionException: An error occurred while executing the command definition. See the inner exception for details. ---> System.Data.SqlClient.SqlException: Subquery returned more than 1 value. This is not permitted when the subquery follows =, !=, <, <= , >, >= or when the subquery is used as an expression. Cannot insert the value NULL into column 'partnerTypeTouchpointQuestionnaire', table 'hs3MVCMTQa2.dbo.autoMailMessage'; column does not allow nulls. UPDATE fails.
